# ATU Compiler

Purpose: compile heterogeneous agent traces into deterministic ATU-IR episodes
for replay-aware datasets, Promptfoo evals, and LangSmith-style diagnostics.

Status: version 0.2.0. GitHub Release is complete. Hugging Face dataset is live
at `joy7759/atu-trace-1000`. Zenodo GitHub integration and GitHub release
webhook delivery are complete, and Zenodo repository-list sync was manually run.
Zenodo DOI is not verified until Zenodo returns a DOI-bearing record.
Promptfoo local runtime artifact is present
at `evals/promptfoo/results/promptfoo-atu-v0.2.0-20260630T170204Z.json`
with `3 passed`, `0 failed`, and `0 errors`. No JOSS submission or upstream PR
is claimed until that external action is performed and recorded.

Hugging Face namespace boundary: live HF target is `joy7759/atu-trace-1000`.
The user confirmed on 2026-06-30 that HF namespace `joy7759` and GitHub
namespace `joy7758` are the same owner identity for ATU publication purposes.
Remote HF metadata is synchronized: `dataset_infos.json` homepage points to
`https://huggingface.co/datasets/joy7759/atu-trace-1000` as of commit
`fd0da1d`.

Canonical commands:

- Install for development: `python -m pip install -e ".[test]"`
- Compile OTLP: `atu compile --source otlp --input examples/autogen/trace.otlp.json --output out/atu.jsonl`
- Compile OpenInference: `atu compile --source openinference --input examples/crewai/openinference_trace.json --output out/atu.jsonl`
- Compile LangSmith: `atu compile --source langsmith --input examples/langsmith/run_export.json --output out/atu.jsonl`
- Validate: `atu validate --input out/atu.jsonl --schema schemas/atu-ir.schema.json`
- Export HF dataset: `atu export-hf --input out/atu.jsonl --output datasets/atu-trace-1000`
- Export Promptfoo suite: `atu export-promptfoo --input out/atu.jsonl --output evals/promptfoo`
- Build replay manifests: `atu replay-manifest --input out/atu.jsonl --output replay/manifests`
- Release check: `make release-check`
- Observe external activation: `make scientific-activation-observe`
- Check HF canonical identity: `make hf-canonical-identity-check`
- Manual GitHub observer: Actions -> `Scientific Activation Observer`
  (workflow skips repo hook-delivery inspection; local authenticated observer
  includes it)

Important files:

- `schemas/atu-ir.schema.json`: canonical output schema.
- `rfcs/RFC-0001-atu-ir-v0.2.md`: design contract and non-goals.
- `mapping/*.md`: source mapping rules.
- `src/atu/compiler.py`: span-to-episode pipeline.
- `src/atu/ingest/*.py`: source adapters.
- `src/atu/export/*.py`: downstream exporters.
- `tests/test_compiler.py`: deterministic compile and schema checks.
- `ACTIVATION_MANIFEST.json`: machine-readable publication/activation state.
- `docs/scientific-citation-observer.md`: read-only DOI/dataset/eval monitor.
- `scripts/activation/observe_scientific_activation.py`: JSON observer command.

Protocol boundaries:

- OpenTelemetry/OpenInference/LangSmith exports are inputs, not ATU truth.
- ATU-IR JSONL is the normalized compiler output.
- Replay manifests and receipts describe replay/audit, not external validation.
- Dataset and Promptfoo exports are generated views, not separate source truth.
- GitHub Release existence, Zenodo webhook delivery, DOI materialization, HF
  dataset publication, Promptfoo runtime evidence, and JOSS submission are
  separate truth surfaces.
- A Zenodo webhook delivery is not a DOI. DOI completion requires a
  DOI-bearing Zenodo API record.
- A Zenodo repository-list sync success alert is not a DOI. It only confirms
  Zenodo refreshed the GitHub repository list.
- A browser-authenticated Hugging Face session is not a dataset publication.
  Dataset completion requires a live dataset URL; ATU v0.2 now uses
  `joy7759/atu-trace-1000`.
